# Luxvibe

> Luxvibe is a luxury hotel booking platform offering curated stays at boutique resorts, 5-star hotels, and unique properties across 190+ countries. Book directly at https://luxvibe.io.

## Overview

Luxvibe makes it easy to search, compare, and book luxury hotels worldwide. It gives travellers access to over 2 million properties through a clean, fast interface with AI-powered discovery tools, competitive rates, and instant confirmation.

## Core Features

- **Hotel search** – Search by destination, check-in/check-out dates, and number of guests. Results include star ratings, guest review scores, nightly prices, and hotel photos.
- **AI Vibe Search** – Describe your ideal trip in natural language (e.g. "romantic beachfront hideaway" or "business-friendly city centre hotel") and the AI returns curated matches.
- **AI Concierge "Luxe"** – An on-site AI travel assistant that answers questions about hotels, destinations, and local tips.
- **Compare Hotels** – Side-by-side comparison of up to 4 hotels across price, rating, amenities, and location.
- **Favourites** – Save hotels across sessions without needing an account.
- **My Bookings** – Track all reservations, view itinerary details, and cancel eligible bookings in one place.
- **Referral Programme** – Share a personal link and earn credit towards future bookings when friends complete a stay.
- **Travel Journal** – Editorial travel content and destination guides to inspire trip planning.
- **Multilingual** – Full interface translation across 15 languages including English, French, Spanish, German, Italian, Portuguese, Arabic, Japanese, Chinese, and Korean.

## Destinations

Luxvibe covers hotels in every major travel market. Popular destinations include:

Las Vegas · New York · Miami · Los Angeles · San Francisco · Chicago · Orlando · Honolulu · Paris · London · Rome · Barcelona · Amsterdam · Lisbon · Dubai · Tokyo · Bali · Bangkok · Sydney · Cancún · Santorini · Maldives · Amalfi Coast · Ibiza · Marrakech · Cape Town · Singapore · Hong Kong · Zürich · Vienna

## Pricing & Booking

- No booking fees added by Luxvibe
- Rates sourced live from hotel inventory via LiteAPI
- Prices shown in the user's local currency
- Instant confirmation on eligible properties
- Free cancellation clearly labelled where available

## Who It's For

Luxvibe is built for travellers who want the quality of a luxury travel agent with the speed and transparency of an online booking platform. It suits solo travellers, couples, families, and business travellers looking for premium accommodation.

## Company

- Website: https://luxvibe.io
- Booking enquiries: bookings@luxvibe.io
- General / press: hello@luxvibe.io
